title: Ping System
description: Simple ping system designed for easy team communication.
body:
Adds a simple ping system that allows players to mark mobs, items, blocks, and other players using a ping wheel. Simply hover over the ping type you want and release the hotkey. 

Pings are visible in-world and provide a quick way to point out locations or entities without using chat.

The mod includes team support, so pings are only visible to players on the same team (teamless is treated as its own team). This allows coordination without revealing information to others on the server.

Pings are highly configurable. Options include adjusting how long pings last, whether pings follow moving targets such as players or mobs (for pvp balancing), and the size and duration of the ping. When a ping is placed, a corresponding message is also shown in chat to indicate who pinged and what was pinged.

The mod is designed to be flexible and usable in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

Please see the gallery for examples.

**This mod is required on both the server and client**
